text.title: Agent Failure Taxonomy Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether agent-failure-taxonomy applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Are you triaging an agent incident or building label aggregation?

example.description: When `yes — single incident` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
